title: Realtime WebSocket Dashboard and Notification Alerts
objective: Deliver real-time client streaming for market, strategy signals, trades, liquidity alerts, and strike rankings with reliable UI updates.
scope: Frontend subscription manager with reconnect and backpressure handling.
Notification hooks (in-app + Telegram) for critical events.
deliverables: Websocket server with auth and channel ACL.
Dashboard widgets updated from streaming events.
Alert delivery pipeline with retry and status tracking.
success_metrics: Websocket updates under 200 ms median publish-to-client.
Client reconnect restores channel subscriptions automatically.
Critical alerts delivered with retry status.
risks: High-frequency stream overload on UI thread.
open_questions: Should all channels be user-specific or include global public channels?
Do we require message signing for websocket payload integrity?
